title: The Embodiment and Completion Ceremony
subtitle: A closing ritual for anchoring abundance as permanent identity at the end of 84 days of money work
excerpt: The Week 12 closing ritual from a 12-week money programme. A five-step ceremony: prepare in stillness and golden light, release every trace of striving and scarcity, allow abundance as a permanent state, integrate by merging with the light, and anchor with a written sentence in your own hand.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 12 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the close of a structured 12-week money programme as a final integration ceremony. Can also be used on any significant financial anniversary or intention-setting moment.

content.text: The Week 12 closing ritual from a 12-week money programme. Its purpose is to anchor abundance as permanent identity — not something you attract through effort, but something you are. Five steps: prepare, release, allow, integrate, anchor.
Sit in stillness. Breathe deeply. Picture yourself standing in radiant golden light that fills your body, your home, and your life — expanding outward in every direction, without edge or limit.
I am ready to release every trace of striving, scarcity, and separation from abundance. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align to and allow abundance as my permanent, effortless state of being. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Take a slow, full breath in, and all the way out. Let any remaining tension leave with the breath.
Picture your energy merging completely with the golden light — no edges between you and it, no separation. You are the wealth, the peace, the generosity, and the joy. Embodied.
Write the sentence below in your own handwriting. Feel it in your body. Say it out loud.
This week, I am grateful that abundance is not something I reach for — it is who I am.
Adapted from the Week 12 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
